item.title: 驯服人工智能疯狂权力波动的竞赛
item.summary: Data center developers and hyperscalers are experimenting with 800 volt direct current (800 VDC) inside their largest data centers. It enables them to pack more compute power in much smaller spaces to run the latest AI applications. 800 VDC also reduces waste heat from electric wires, lowers cable weight, and eliminate
